message:
core/types: implement bd-3go.12 epoch validity windows + coordination

Add EpochClock (atomic monotone counter), EpochBarrier (all-or-nothing
transition), BLAKE3-based epoch auth key derivation with domain separation,
and fail-closed SymbolValidityWindow validation per §4.18.

- EpochId: add ZERO constant and next() with overflow protection
- SymbolValidityWindow: add default_window() and contains() methods
- RootManifest: add ecs_epoch field for durable epoch storage
- New epoch.rs module with 11 passing unit tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
